queries.question: For every lab, list the equipment they use.
queries.sql: select labs.name , equipment.type from Labs_Equipment join Equipment on Labs_Equipment.equipment_id = Equipment.id join Labs on Labs_Equipment.labs_id = Labs.id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/education#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/education/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?type WHERE {
  ?labs_equipment a :Labs_Equipment .
  ?equipment a :Equipment .
  ?labs_equipment p:hasEquipment ?equipment .
  ?labs a :Labs .
  ?labs_equipment p:hasLabs ?labs .
  ?labs p:name ?name .
  ?equipment p:type ?type .
}

queries.question: Tell me the equipment each lab uses.
queries.sql: SELECT Equipment.type  from Labs_Equipment join Equipment on Labs_Equipment.equipment_id = Equipment.id join Labs on Labs_Equipment.labs_id = Labs.id   GROUP BY Labs_Equipment.equipment_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Labs_Equipment.labs_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Labs)

ambiguous_dsl.question: Tell me the equipment each lab uses.
